steps.title: Identify the goal: contrast each system’s defining limitation
steps.content: The notes give one key limitation for each plant. The Wayang Windu flash steam system requires geothermal reservoir temperatures above 180°C — a disadvantage because many reservoirs are not that hot. The Raft River binary cycle system has higher maintenance costs than flash steam systems. A correct answer must highlight Wayang Windu’s temperature restriction as a disadvantage by contrasting it with Raft River’s ability to operate at lower temperatures — the comparison surfaces Wayang Windu’s limitation.

steps.title: Eliminate each wrong choice and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — ‘Compared with the system used at the Wayang Windu plant, the system used at the Raft River plant has a notable disadvantage: its cost.’: This names only Raft River’s disadvantage (cost) and omits Wayang Windu’s temperature limitation entirely — no comparison of both. ✗
  • Choice B — ‘Unlike the Raft River plant, the Wayang Windu plant uses a flash steam system, which requires a less common resource: geothermal reservoirs with temperatures above 180°C.’: This names only Wayang Windu’s disadvantage and says nothing about Raft River’s higher maintenance costs. ✗
  • Choice C — ‘The system used at the Raft River plant overcomes the temperature limitations of the Wayang Windu plant’s system but is more costly to maintain.’: This downplays Wayang Windu’s temperature limitation by casting Raft River’s flexibility as an “overcoming” advantage rather than letting Wayang Windu’s restriction stand as the focal disadvantage — the framing obscures the limitation rather than highlighting it. ✗
  • Choice D — ‘The system at the Wayang Windu plant requires temperatures above 180°C, while the system at the Raft River plant can operate at lower temperatures.’: This directly sets Wayang Windu’s temperature restriction against Raft River’s lower-temperature operation, placing both systems’ defining limitations side by side in a clear comparison. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
